character_buff.name: Key Card
character_buff.description: Mix decks and pick a card. According to which kind of deck you picked,

effects: Duration : 5 Minutes.
[Speedy Celine] A.R.+1, ATK SPD +30%, Additional damage to enemy PC with normal attack in proportion to Max HP
[Mario of Strength] A.R.+1, ATK +30%, ATK SPD -20%
[Tricky Frost] A.R.+1, Skill Casting Time -20%
[Sharp Helena] A.R.+1, Mental Penetration +15
[Cool-headed Emily] A.R.+1, Received Skill Damage -15%
[Fortune Card] A.R.+2, ATK +50%, ATK SPD +30%, Mental Penetration +15, Received Skill Damage -10%, Casting time -20%

stances.name: Manipulation

skills.name: One Card
skills.description: It occurs an explosion with throwing a magic card.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 12m away and within a 4m radius

effects: 50% chance to inflict [Joker] on enemy
Skill damage increases in proportion to HP of enemy that got more HP than the casters HP.
50% chance to inflict [Joker] on enemy
Skill damage increases in proportion to HP of enemy that got more HP than the casters HP.

skills.name: Hidden Card
skills.description: It throws the card that is filled with the secret skill of Arsene Four Devas. The summoned Four Devas will disappear after the attack.

effects: Random summon of the Four Devas
According to the skill level and INT, the bonus ability of the Four Devas will be applied.
Extinction after the attack
The summoned Four Devas will disappear if there was no enemy within 7m.
